blocks.heading: Future capabilities
bullets: Edge gateway and native mobile applications
Digital twins and customer-specific AI models
Operator behavior scoring and GPS geofencing
Dedicated rugged hardware platform with edge inference
In-browser portal editing and advanced hosting (Phase 2 portal)

blocks.heading: Future hardware platform
blocks.content: Rugged industrial edge device: CAN Bus, J1939, GPS, LTE/5G, secure communications, optional edge inference. Device hosts models and gathers data — it is not the AI itself.
